topic: Agent HQ Strategy: Using Copilot, Claude, and Codex Together for Better Code
hook: GitHub just became a multi-agent battleground — here's how to play it
audience: Teams and enterprise developers evaluating how to use multiple AI agents strategically
keyTakeaway: Running Copilot, Claude, and Codex on the same task surfaces different tradeoffs, helping you catch issues before code review
talkingPoints: Agent HQ now supports Copilot, Claude by Anthropic, and OpenAI Codex in one place
The 3-agent strategy: architecture review, edge case hunting, and minimal implementation
Demo: Assigning the same refactoring task to multiple agents and comparing approaches
Enterprise controls: How org admins can manage which agents are permitted
Real talk: When multiple agents help vs. when they're overkill
trendContext: GitHub announced Claude and Codex integration in Agent HQ on Feb 4, 2026 - now in public preview for Copilot Pro+ and Enterprise, with more agents from Google, Cognition, and xAI coming soon
